title: digitaria biformis subsp. desvauxii
intro: Digitaria biformis subsp. desvauxii, also known as Desmodium heterophyllum or Desmodium biforme, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Digitaria biformis subsp. desvauxii include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
